question: How do you describe the size and poseability of these figures?
hint: 58 centimeters / change direction / rotate / look at different aspects
text: These figures stand at a commanding 58 centimeters tall. Each one has articulated joints and a rotating head, so you can change their pose, direction, and even make them look at different things. It's like having a customizable art piece.

question: How do you sell the tactile experience of the figure's back material?
hint: Waterproof material / coat-like texture / no squeegee and fluffy
text: Feel the back of the figure. We use a special waterproof material that has this incredible texture—it's like the high-quality fabric on a premium coat. It's not sticky or weird; it's smooth and has a subtle, fluffy depth to it.

question: How do you explain the meaning behind the colorful 'spice' element?
hint: Spice / many different colors / representing different stories / 10 years
text: Look at this vibrant 'spice' element here. All these different colors aren't random. Each one represents a unique story from the last decade of this character's journey. It's a visual history lesson.

question: How do you create urgency for a special launch happening on Thursday?
hint: Special launch / Thursday / get hands on in advance / black one
text: Listen up! This is a really special launch happening this Thursday. If you want the white version, you need to get your hands on it in advance right now. Because later, if you try to get the black one, it might be too late. Don't miss out.
